studies.title: Investigating the effectiveness of an online-based program for the treatment of anxiety disorders (Novego) - A randomized controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Novego – Ängste überwinden', which is a program for anxiety disorders, not 'Novego: Depressionen bewältigen', which is for depression. The study focuses on anxiety, not depression, indicating a different product.

studies.title: Investigation of the effectiveness of the internet-based intervention ‘Novego... sleep better’ - a randomised controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Novego... sleep better', which appears to be a different intervention focused on sleep improvement, not the 'Novego: Depressionen bewältigen' product for depression. The study targets insomnia and sleep disorders, not depression.
